title: Omni-Stack: Multi-Model AI + Chat
description: Unified AI stack: Qwen3-Coder-480B, Qwen3-Next-80B, Qwen2.5-VL-32B (vision), Lilith-Whisper-70B, and Wan2.2 (video). Includes a built-in chat webapp (port 8888) with multi-file/image upload and API-key permission gate. OpenAI-compatible gateway on :8000. SSH on configurable port.

input.name: HuggingFace Token
input.description: Your HuggingFace access token for downloading models

input.name: Qwen3-Coder GGUF Model Tag
input.description: Ollama-compatible tag for the Qwen3-Coder 480B GGUF model. Use hf.co/ prefix to pull directly from HuggingFace.

input.name: Chat App API Key
input.description: Access key for the built-in chat webapp on port 8888. If left blank a random key is auto-generated and printed to /workspace/logs/chat_app.log on first boot.

input.name: Chat Default Model
input.description: Default model selected in the chat UI (qwen3-coder, qwen3-80b, vision, lilith)

input.name: Chat App Port
input.description: Port for the built-in chat webapp

input.name: SSH Port
input.description: Port the SSH server listens on. Ensure this matches a port exposed in your RunPod template.

input.name: SSH Public Key
input.description: Your SSH public key (e.g. contents of ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub). Authorizes passwordless SSH access to the pod.

input.name: Primary LLM
input.description: HuggingFace model ID for the primary text model (served via vLLM)

input.name: Tensor Parallel Size
input.description: Number of GPUs to split the model across

input.name: GPU Memory Utilization
input.description: Fraction of GPU memory to use for vLLM (0.0-0.95)
